title: Ranklinge
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Ranklinge |region=*[[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[The Slice/Legends|The Slice]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' — [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] |sector=[[Shelsha sector/Legends|Shelsha sector]] |system=[[Ranklinge system/Legends|Ranklinge system]] |coordinates=M-9 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=Terrestrial |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest=[[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]] [[Plant/Legends|plant]] |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies=[[Human/Legends|Humans]] |socialgroup= |language=[[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] |government= |population= |demonym= |cities=*[[Ranklinge City]] {{C|capital}} *[[Janusar]] |imports= |exports= |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] }} '''Ranklinge''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Shelsha sector/Legends|Shelsha sector]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]. ==Geography== {{Quote|There's nothing on the southern continent?''"
"''Nothing but a civil war. Been going on for the past ten years.|[[Korlo Brightwater]] and [[Saberan Marcross]]|[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']]}} Its [[Capital/Legends|capital]], [[Ranklinge City]], had an [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]] [[Factory/Legends|plant]] on its outskirts that produced [[I-7 Howlrunner]]s at the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. The main [[City/Legends|cities]], including the capital and [[Janusar]], were on the northern continent; the southern continent had been embroiled in a [[civil war]] since around [[10 BBY/Legends|10 BBY]]. ==History== The [[South Cont's civil war]] began in [[10 BBY/Legends|10 BBY]]. After two [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of war, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] sent a couple of [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomats]] in [[8 BBY/Legends|8 BBY]] to mediate the conflict. They didn't manage to solve the war and all Imperial forces eventually left the planet. The civil war was not ended in the [[Standard month/Legends|months]] following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. {{Planet-stub}} ==Appearances== *[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] {{Ab|Allegiance (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Rankling |pl=Ranklinge |fi=Ranklinge }} [[Category:Galactic Empire planets]] [[Category:Planets in the Colonies]] [[Category:Planets in the Slice]] [[Category:Shelsha sector locations]] [[Category:Terrestrial planets]] {{RelatedCategories |[[Category:Ranklinge locations]] }}
